input.instructions: Search theoretical physics literature (arXiv, journals) for 'single-photon Hawking radiation classicality'. Specifically, identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern this phenomenon. Look for terms like 'classicality parameter', 'dimensionless constants', and 'Hawking radiation photon statistics'. Provide the exact numerical values for these three constants.

orchestration.decision_notes: I need to search for the specific theoretical physics literature requested to identify the three universal dimensionless constants related to single-photon Hawking radiation classicality.
